raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad klausi tu Debbefis/ 
un darri un teefa tavus Kalpus/ 
to Metaifnu noteefadams/ un 
dohdams winna Zeltu uß winna 
Galwu/ un to Taifnu taifno- 
dams/ dohdams winnam pehz 
fawas Taifnibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad tawi Israëta Lau- 
dis kanti taps preefsch faweem 
Gengtdneefeem/ kad tee prett tew 
buhs grehkojuschi/ un pee tew at- 
greeschahs/ un tawan Wahrdam 
to fuhdsehs/ un tew fchini Nami- 
ma peeluhas/ un ſirdigi peefauks/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad klausi tu Debbefis/ 
un peedohd tawu Israëta Lau- 
schu Grebkus/ un wedd tohs at- 
kat us to Semmi/ fo tu winnu 
Tehweem effi dewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad ta Debbes buhs ais- 
flehgta/ ka Leetus ne buhs/ ta- 
pehz ka tee prett tew buhs ap- 
grehkojschees/ un tee fchinni Wee- 
ta luhgs/ un tawam Wahrdam 
to fuhdsehs/ un no faweem Greh- 
keen atgreesifees/ kad tu tohs 
apbehdina/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad klausi tu Debbefis/ 
un peedohd tawu Kalpu un ta- 
wu Israëta Lauschu Grebkus/ 
ka tu teem to labbu Zeltu parah- 
di/ kur teem jastaiga/ un Leetus 
dohdi us to Semmi/ fo tu ta- 
weem Laudim par Eemantofcha- 
nu dewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad Badda-Laiks eeksch 
Semmes buhs/ kad buhs Meh- 
ris/ Bulla-Laiks/ Ruhsa/ Gif-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kurſch tad luhrs/ kurſch 
no Sirds peefauks/ lai buht ka- 
buhdamis no wiſſeem tatveem I- 
sraëta Laudim/ kad tee atſihe- 
fawu Sirds Mohzibu/ un fawa- 
Rohkas tchinni Namina is- 
plattihß/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad klausi tu Debbefis/ 
tai Weeta/ fur tu dſihwo/ un 
peedohd/ un darri/ un dohd ikat- 
ram vehz wiſſeem winna Zet- 
teem/ ittin ka tu winna Sird- 
pasihsti/ jo tu ween pasihsti wiſ- 
fu Zilweka Behrnu Sirdi/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka tee tew bihstahß wiſ- 
fä Laikä/ kamehr tee wirß tah- 
Semmes dſihwohs/ fo tu win- 
nu Tehweem effi dewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 41,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad arri kahds Sweſchaje 
buhs/ kas no taweem Israë- 
Laudim ne irr/ bet no tahka- 
Semmes tawa Wahrdä deht at- 
gahjis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 42,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "(Jo tee dſirdehs no tawa 
leela Wahrdä/ un no tawas ſtip- 
ras Rohkas/ un no tawaisſteep- 
ta Elſona/) un nahks un pee- 
luhgs fchinni Namina/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 43,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad klausi tu Debbefis/ 
tai Weeta/ fur tu dſihwo/ un 
darri pehz wiſſu/ par ko tas Swe- 
ſchajs tew peefauks/ ka wiſſa- 
Pafaules Laudis tan u Wahrd- 
pasihst/ un tew bihstahß/ itt ka- 
tawi Israëta Laudis/ uu ka te-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
